node.description: Iko is a member of Fuurin high school's broadcasting club. She dreams of becoming a Vtuber.
Shinobu is a member of Fuurin high school's broadcasting club. She dreams of becoming an announcer
Rikka is the president of Fuurin high school's broadcasting club. She dreams of becoming a singer.
Nene is a member of Fuurin high school's broadcasting club. She dreams of becoming a voice actress.

Arisu is a transfer student at Fuurin high school. He enters the broadcasting club because he's looking for the host of a radio show he used to listen to years ago, who he believes to be one of the club members.
Advisor to the broadcasting club who yearns to be called "Lemon-chan." She tries not to rock the boat or stand out but still helps the club.
She is a student at Furin High School, and Rikka's former band member.

Momotose Ao is a famous VTuber and side character in Tune In to the Midnight Heart. As part of the VTuber group Blue Box, she has over 3 million subscribers and does streaming as well as live shows.

(Source: Tune in to the Midnight Heart Wiki)
